name: vscode-mcp-output-reader
description: MCP server that exposes VS Code Output channels (Ruff, Pylance, ESLint, Python, etc.) to AI models via HTTP and stdio transports

commands.title: MCP Output Reader: List Captured Channels
MCP Output Reader: Show Server Status

mcpOutputReader.port.description: Port on which the HTTP MCP server listens

mcpOutputReader.transport.description: Transport protocol(s) to enable. 'http' = HTTP only (port 6070), 'stdio' = Unix socket / Windows named pipe only, 'both' = both transports simultaneously (default)

mcpOutputReader.maxLines.description: Maximum lines to keep per output channel buffer

mcpOutputReader.watchedChannels.description: Channel names to watch (empty = watch ALL). Examples: ["Ruff", "Pylance", "ESLint", "Python"]
